analysis.reasoning: The tweet emphasizes EU-ASEAN collaboration to combat COVID-19 and promote economic recovery, signaling solidarity and multilateral cooperation. This aligns with EU2 (EU is united) through emphasis on joining forces, and EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) via its global partnership and development with regional partners. It does not describe internal history or advocacy for citizens’ policies beyond this cooperation, so EU2 and EU6 are the applicable narratives.
